Plimsoll Mark PLIGHTPronunciation (US): Dictionary entry overview: What does plight mean?• PLIGHT (noun) The noun PLIGHT has 2 senses:1. a situation from which extrication is difficult especially an unpleasant or trying one 2. a solemn pledge
